temporal_description: A medium shot captures a woman with long, straight blonde hair in a living room. She wears a black, short-sleeved top with a floral pattern and a silver necklace. She gestures with both hands as she speaks, looking off-camera to her left. The background consists of a wooden media console with a television on top and a small, golden statuette on the right. The audio features a conversation between two women in a quiet room. The first woman speaks with a slightly dismissive and matter-of-fact tone, stating, "anymore. He quit for me." Her voice then drops to a lower, more conspiratorial pitch as she adds a soft, knowing "Mmm." The woman then smiles and turns her head slightly. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a second woman sitting on a striped couch. She has her brown hair styled in an updo and is wearing a light blue, patterned spaghetti strap top and a simple necklace. She looks concerned, with her hands clasped in her lap. The background is a cluttered but cozy living room, with various items and furniture visible behind her. The second woman responds with a concerned and slightly exasperated voice, beginning her thought with, "This guy has been obsessed." Her tone conveys a sense of worry and disbelief. The shot remains static, focusing on her expressive face. There is no background music or other significant sound.
